## Page 7

# **2023 at a glance**

## Page 7

7

## Page 8

Image /page/7/Picture/0 description: The image shows the logo of a company, followed by the text "2023 ANNUAL REPORT" and the word "CONTENTS" with two right-pointing arrows.

## Page 8

# Geopolitical background

## Page 8

This year, once again, we have made it clear that one of our greatest strengths is the ability to be agile, decisive and flexible when faced with changes in the environment. This year, fraught with difficult challenges, has been yet another test of our ability to be resilient, thrive in the face of adversity and emerge stronger.

## Page 8

2023 was marked by a complex and unstable geopolitical landscape, characterised by international conflicts such as the war in Ukraine and the conflict between Israel and Palestine, as well as tensions between the Western powers and China.

## Page 8

## **Increased production costs**

## Page 8

These international conflicts and geopolitical tensions have impacted the environment, causing high market volatility, volatile costs, as well as serious tensions in global supply chains, especially in terms of raw materials and energy.

## Page 8

### **Evolution in the price of CO2 emission allowances**

## Page 8

As in previous years, the price of CO2 emission allowances increased during 2023. This trend is a result of growing concern surrounding climate change and the measures being taken to cut greenhouse gas emissions.

## Page 8

This has prompted companies in the sector to invest in more efficient and sustainable technologies in order to cut their emissions and meet customers' growing demand for sustainable products. In fact, an increasing number of manufacturers are launching products with low CO2 emissions.

## Page 8

From Tubos Reunidos' perspective as a manufacturer, consolidating our steelworks has also served to significantly reduce our carbon footprint and CO<sup>2</sup> emissions, mitigating the risk of this price increase.

## Page 8

### **Sectoral concentration**

## Page 8

The sector is becoming more concentrated, some companies are acquiring distributors, processing plants and key assets to strengthen their position in key markets. Other companies are abandoning Europe.

## Page 8

### **EU Taxonomy**

## Page 8

The EU is promoting the European Green Deal, which aims to achieve climate neutrality by 2050, through the Taxonomy Regulation. This regulation classifies economic activities according to six environmental objectives. Companies must assess whether their activities are within the scope of the taxonomy and whether they meet the technical criteria. The taxonomy establishes three key performance indicators for non-financial entities, based on business information, CapEx (capital expenditure) and OpEx (operating expenditure). These reflect the potential and actual sustainability of the activities.

## Page 8

In 2023, we carried out an analysis for our activities in comparison to the requirements of the Taxonomy Regulation. All companies of the consolidated Tubos Reunidos Group were included in scope. As stated in the regulation, we have studied the eligibility and alignment of the two climate objectives (mitigation and adaptation).

## Page 9

CASH GENERATION IN 2022 AND 2023, WHICH WAS OBTAINED THANKS TO HIGHER REVENUE AND PROFITS, ENABLED US TO MAKE THE INVESTMENTS SET OUT IN THE STRATEGIC PLAN, MOST NOTABLY THE CONSOLIDATION OF THE STEELWORKS THIS YEAR, REDUCING NET FINANCIAL DEBT AND HAVING SUFFICIENT LIQUIDITY AT THE END OF THE 2023 FINANCIAL YEAR TO FURTHER ROLL OUT THE PLAN.

## Page 9

MOREOVER, WE FULLY PAID OFF ALL ICO-GUARANTEED FINANCING RECEIVED IN 2020 DURING THE PANDEMIC ONE YEAR EARLY.

## Page 10

# 2023 milestones

## Page 10

Image /page/9/Figure/2 description: A close-up shot under ultraviolet light shows a gloved hand applying a substance to a cylindrical object. The hand, clad in a blue glove, is positioned on the right side of the frame, with the fingers gently pressing down on the object. The substance being applied appears as a translucent, gel-like material, illuminated by the UV light. The cylindrical object, which dominates the lower half of the image, has a smooth surface with a faint, linear marking. The UV light casts a blue hue over the entire scene, enhancing the visibility of the substance and the surface details of the object.

## Page 10

Image /page/9/Figure/3 description: The image shows a timeline of business events. The first event is "Appointment" and the description is "Of a Chief Commercial Officer, to drive the commercial strategy". The second event is "Resignation" and the description is "Voluntary resignation of Mr Francisco Irazusta, Executive Chair.". The third event is "Separation of roles" and the description is "Of Non-Executive Chair and Chief Executive". The fourth event is "Preparation" and the description is "Of the Double Materiality Analysis". The fifth event is "Optimisation" and the description is "Of the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) model, which has more better-quality information and establishes new dynamics with customers.". The sixth event is "Consolidation" and the description is "Of the two steelworks (Sestao and Amurrio) into a single facility located in Amurrio.". The seventh event is "Certification" and the description is "Of the first Environmental Product Declarations enabling us to lay the foundations to reduce our pipes' environmental footprint and allowing our products' environmental footprints to be objectively compared with those of other manufacturers". The eighth event is "Appointment of Josu Calvo" and the description is "As the new Non-Executive Chair".

## Page 11

# Our projects

## Page 11

#### USA

## Page 11

**Project: Revolution Wind Farm — Offshore**

## Page 11

Area: Wind Energy Customer: SWEA Tonnes: 113 Description: Offshore wind farm that will be operational in 2025 and will generate 304 MW of clean energy for Connecticut and 400 MW for Rhode Island.

## Page 11

**Project: Venture Global — Calcasieu LNG Phase1** Area: LNG

## Page 11

Customer: US Metals Tonnes: 400 Description: Liquefied natural gas (LNG) export facility in Cameron,

## Page 11

Louisiana. Once completed, the plant will have the capacity to export 10 million metric tonnes of Liquefied Natural Gas per year.

## Page 11

#### **Project: Mid West Clean**

## Page 11

Area: Chemical Plant or Bioenergy Customer: American Piping Tonnes: 100

## Page 11

Description: MWCEP (Mid West Clean Energy Project) is a clean ammonia export project aiming to produce up to 1.2 million tonnes per annum of clean ammonia starting in 2027, at a competitive cost compared to existing conventional grey ammonia production. The project includes several subprojects including carbon management for third parties, permanently storing the project's own CO<sup>2</sup> associated with blue hydrogen production, through to the production of clean ammonia from blue and green hydrogen.

## Page 11

> MEXICO **Project: Maintenance of the**
